domain: Carnatic raga melakarta system (South India): 72 parent ragas in 12 chakras × 6 ragas combinatorial structure; chakra names Indu/Netra/Agni/Veda/Bana/Rutu/Rishi/Vasu/Brahma/Disi/Rudra/Aditya (1-12 from mythic anchors); 2×6×6 = 72 mathematically derived from madhyama-sharp/flat × R-G × D-N combinations; Katapayadi mnemonic encodes raga-index from first 2 consonants of raga-name; sampurna (all 7 swaras both ascending+descending palindrome); each parent generates many janya (derived) ragas by selective inclusion.
specific_mechanism: MELAKARTA-12-CHAKRA-6-RAGA-72-COMBO-KATAPAYADI-NAME-INDEX-SAMPURNA-PALINDROME-SYMMETRIC-SPECTRAL-ALLOCATION: LLM spectral-allocation mechanism with (1) 12-chakra × 6-raga combinatorial grid F_12×6: 12 attention frequency-band groups × 6 sub-bands = 72 orthogonal sub-band anchors for attention-heads; (2) 2×6×6 decomposition D_chakra: each anchor decomposed madhyama-sharp/flat × R-G × D-N; analog to RoPE base × bias × scale 3-parameter encoding; (3) Katapayadi-mnemonic name-to-index code C_kat: encoding scheme mapping head-name to head-index using first 2 phoneme/byte slots; deterministic head-index recovery; (4) sampurna palindrome-symmetric constraint P_palin: per-head spectrum required palindrome (ascending=descending); regularizer; (5) janya derivation tree T_janya: 72 parent heads spawn many task-specific derived heads via selective subspace masking. Differs from R532 GUQIN-7-STRING-13-HUI (7-head-group × 13-frequency-node + 3-mode + half-hui + 91-position) and R545 GEORGIAN-3-VOICE-TRIAD-DISSONANT (3-voice-band + C-F-G + drone-bani + 2-melismatic + 2-4-7-9 regularizer) by 12-chakra × 6-raga 72-grid + 2×6×6 decomposition + Katapayadi name-to-index + sampurna palindrome-symmetric + janya derivation tree.
llm_application: MELAKARTA-12-CHAKRA-6-RAGA-72-COMBO-KATAPAYADI-NAME-INDEX-SAMPURNA-PALINDROME-SYMMETRIC-SPECTRAL-ALLOCATION LLM mechanism + 12-chakra × 6-raga combinatorial F_12×6 72 sub-band anchors + 2×6×6 decomposition madhyama-sharp/flat × R-G × D-N 3-parameter + Katapayadi C_kat name-to-index code 2-phoneme deterministic + sampurna P_palin palindrome-symmetric regularizer + janya T_janya derivation tree 72 parents spawn task-specific heads selective masking. Differs from R520 + R532 GUQIN (closest — 7-head-group × 13-hui + 3-mode + 91-position). R540 + R545 GEORGIAN (closest — 3-voice-band + Georgian-Triad + 2-melismatic + 2-4-7-9). Differs from Hallucination Spectral + Modular Architectures + MLA + Efficient Inference by 12-chakra × 6-raga 72-grid + Katapayadi name-to-index + palindrome regularizer + janya tree. Differs by 12-CHAKRA × 6-RAGA 72-COMBO + KATAPAYADI NAME-INDEX + SAMPURNA PALINDROME + JANYA DERIVATION TREE.
novelty_claim: Hallucination Spectral EMNLP 2025 + Modular Architectures + MLA + Efficient Inference INLG 2025 cover spectral attention + modular + multi-head latent paradigm. MELAKARTA-12-CHAKRA-6-RAGA-72-COMBO-KATAPAYADI-NAME-INDEX-SAMPURNA-PALINDROME-SYMMETRIC adds (a) 72-grid + (b) Katapayadi name-to-index + (c) palindrome-symmetric + (d) janya derivation tree + (e) 2×6×6 decomposition. Recombination — borderline lookup.
